name: Northwest Cioppino-WW >-}Dgsv43a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3½ or 4-quart saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions, green pepper, carrot, celery, and garlic to the pan. Stir frequently until the vegetables are tender, about 2 minutes.
3. Add crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, water, white wine, chicken broth, bay leaf, oregano, salt, pepper, and red pepper (or hot sauce). Mix well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for about 20 minutes until the flavors are blended.
6. Stir in the fish fillets and cook for an additional 7-10 minutes until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
7. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
